notes: The game runs fine in the little over an hour I played it (with keyboard and mouse). I've only noticed two issues so far: some minor graphical glitching/stuttering in one particular area in the background of one of the levels which had no impact on gameplay, and, bizarrely, no visible text showing when I watch the credits.
title: Seasons after Fall

notes: Cursor not showing on Steam overlay, apart from that works great!

notes: Full playthrough (7 hours) without any problems.
title: Seasons after Fall

notes: The game runs stable, although it seems to stutter very slightly. Steam's FPS counter reports a stable 60FPS (I capped it there, my monitors don't do more than 60Hz) count, but it feels like there's some micro-stuttering
title: Seasons after Fall

notes: Xbox gamepad stops responding after a while. Other than that, finished game without other issues
title: Seasons after Fall

notes: Works perfectly with a wired xbox gamepad. The input lag that was there with previous version of proton has disappeared.
